user.description: Enter your Realtime Trains next-generation API token. Sign up at {api_portal_url} if you don't already have one.

data.default_slot_count: Default number of departures per board

data_description.token: A long-life access token or a refresh token. Both are detected and handled automatically.

reconfigure.title: Replace token
reconfigure.description: Paste a new Realtime Trains API token to replace the one configured under {reconfigure_title}. Your monitored boards and service trackers will be preserved.

reauth_confirm.title: Reauthenticate Realtime Trains
reauth_confirm.description: The token for {reauth_title} is no longer valid. Enter a new Realtime Trains API token.

confirm.title: Confirm account

error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to data.rtt.io. Check your network and retry.
error.invalid_auth: The token was rejected by Realtime Trains. Make sure you're using a next-generation API token from api-portal.rtt.io.
error.rate_limited: Your API token is rate-limited. Wait a few minutes and retry.
error.unknown: Unexpected error. Check the Home Assistant log for details.

account_not_ready.message: The Realtime Trains account is still loading. Wait a moment and retry.

bad_datetime.message: `{value}` is not a valid ISO 8601 datetime.

config_entry_not_found.message: No Realtime Trains account with entry id `{entry_id}`.

coordinator_not_found.message: No board or service tracker matches subentry `{subentry_id}`. It may have been removed.

date_required_with_headcode.message: A departure date is required when using a headcode.

device_not_a_subentry.message: Device `{device_id}` is not a Realtime Trains board or service tracker.

invalid_auth.message: The token was rejected by Realtime Trains.

not_found.message: Realtime Trains could not find the requested resource: {detail}

rate_limited.message: Your API token is rate-limited. Wait and retry. ({detail})

service_id_required.message: Either a unique_identity or a headcode is required.

window_too_large.message: The requested time window exceeds 23 hours 59 minutes. Narrow time_to or use time_window.

get_departures.description: Fetch a departure board on demand for the chosen account.

config_entry_id.description: The Realtime Trains account to use.
config_entry_id.name: Account

detailed.description: Enable detailed mode (requires the allowDetailed entitlement).
detailed.name: Detailed

filter_from.description: Only return trains that previously called at this station.
filter_from.name: Filter from

filter_to.description: Only return trains that subsequently call at this station.
filter_to.name: Filter to

station.description: Short or long code or `namespace:code` form.
station.name: Station

time_from.description: ISO 8601 start of the query window. Defaults to now.
time_from.name: Time from

time_to.description: End of the query window. Mutually exclusive with time_window.
time_to.name: Time to

time_window.description: Window width in minutes. Defaults to 60.
time_window.name: Time window

get_departures.name: Get departures

get_service.description: Fetch full detail for a single service, including formation and Know-Your-Train data where entitled.

config_entry_id.description: The Realtime Trains account to use.
config_entry_id.name: Account

date.description: Departure date from origin. Required with headcode.
date.name: Date

get_service.name: Get service

find_station.description: Search the cached RTT stops list without going to the network.

namespace.description: Filter to one namespace, e.g. gb-nr. Leave blank to include all namespaces.
namespace.name: Namespace

query.description: Substring to match against station descriptions or codes. Case-insensitive.
query.name: Query

config_entry_id.description: The Realtime Trains account to use.
config_entry_id.name: Account

find_station.name: Find station

refresh_now.description: Force an immediate refresh of a board or service tracker device.

device_id.description: The device ID of the board or service tracker to refresh.
device_id.name: Device

refresh_now.name: Refresh now

user.title: Add departure board
user.description: Search for a station by name and configure how many departures you want exposed.

data.slot_count: Number of departure slots to expose

data_description.station: Type part of the station name — e.g. 'Clapham' — and pick from the matches on the next step.
data_description.detailed: Enables internal times and STP indicators. Requires allowDetailed on your token.

pick_station.title: Pick a station
pick_station.description: {station_count} stations matched. Pick the exact one you want.

reconfigure.title: Edit departure board
reconfigure.description: Adjust this board's options. The station stays the same — add a new board to monitor a different station.

data.slot_count: Number of departure slots to expose

error.account_not_ready: The account is still loading. Wait a moment and retry.
error.station_required: Enter a station name or code.
error.no_station_matches: No stations matched. Try a different fragment.
error.station_invalid: Pick a station from the list.
error.cannot_connect: Cannot reach Realtime Trains to search stations. Retry shortly.

user.title: Add service tracker
user.description: Follow a single train by headcode and date (or full unique identity).

data_description.unique_identity: Full `namespace:identity:date` form, e.g. `gb-nr:1L40:2026-06-18`. Takes priority over headcode+date.
data_description.date: Departure date from the train's planned origin.

reconfigure.title: Edit service tracker
reconfigure.description: Point this tracker at a different train by headcode and date (or full unique identity).

data_description.unique_identity: Full `namespace:identity:date` form, e.g. `gb-nr:1L40:2026-06-18`. Takes priority over headcode+date.
data_description.date: Departure date from the train's planned origin.

error.account_not_ready: The account is still loading. Wait a moment and retry.
error.headcode_required: Either headcode+date or unique identity is required.
error.service_not_found: No service found with the given headcode/date (or unique identity).
